procedure: All Redis vars (REDIS_PRIVATE_URL, REDIS_URL, UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL, UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN) set to unreachable sentinels, then redeployed.

findings.bootBehavior: FATAL: Cross-region treasury hash mismatch — server refused to start
findings.paymentBehavior: HTTP 502 from Railway load balancer — payments rejected (fail-safe)
findings.specificError: [Boot] FATAL: Cross-region treasury hash mismatch — Reached the max retries per request limit (which is 3)

notes: Server enters crash loop on boot when Redis is unavailable
Boot-time security check (treasury hash reconciliation) throws on Redis failure
Railway load balancer returns 502 — no payments can be processed
This is stronger than the 'fail-closed 401' in replayGuard: the entire service refuses to start
Redis was immediately restored; final payment confirmed HTTP 200 (jobId: 776c0ed5)
verdict: PASS — system fails closed when Redis is unavailable
